error_signature: Failed to connect to MCP Server; MCP error -32000
title: MCP Server connection failure
symptom: When attempting to connect to the MCP Server using the MCP node, n8n throws 'Failed to connect to MCP Server; MCP error -32000'.
not_this_if: Using HTTP node with cURL works
Already on n8n version 1.85.4 or higher
root_cause: The error occurs due to compatibility issues with the MCP node and the n8n version being used. Upgrading both the n8n platform and the MCP node can resolve these issues.
fix_steps: Upgrade n8n to version 1.85.4 or higher
Upgrade the MCP node to version 0.17
Change the command from '-y @modelcontextprotocol/server-perplexity-ask' to '-y server-perplexity-ask'
agent_instruction: Upgrade n8n and the MCP node to the specified versions and adjust the installation command.
